reviews.review_description: Homeland

I like the gameplay, it's a lot of fun.
    
    It's a shame that there are so many annoying bugs that spoil the experience.

    We are happy with the ranking, but the point system is not uniform.
I wish there was a trackable system so we know what we get points for.

    Many times quets 2 freezes because of the game and it bothers me that a player is punished for that.
It's hard to get a point and it's also taken away from you. But what's really a steal is that in the 1.6 update it reset my rank in both 2v2 and 1v1.  I moved up more than 200 places from the top of the list...😥

    If you're not in the same place as your party partner, it's hard to start a game. The search stops continuously, which the admin does not see, there is no warning.

    Thank you for the second season, the many skins, caps and extras (of which the free one is not good for anything) but I feel like I can't be happy with them as long as there are such big bugs in the game.

    I look forward to this game getting better and better.
I've been using my quest 2 for over a year and I think I've played ultimech the most so far, I really like the idea, the style.

    I'd like to see you get more players, and in the meantime I'd love to have a display in the lobby where we can see how many players are online in total, just so we know if it's worth waiting for a game or not.
    
    Keep up the good work and good luck with your development. 😄

Updated 04/13/2023 There are too many cheats and manipulations in the game.  If it continues like this, not only me and my team will be disappointed, don't be surprised that more and more people will leave the game.  If you don't change this situation, in the end only game developers will be playing with each other.

I feel that Orion drift is better

I saw a review saying to not compare it with RL. Well, I beg to differ. It's very similar, and if you like RL, you will love this. The ball has the same physics. It's a very skill intensive game, so expect to lose at a big score difference against a more seasoned player, and also win convincingly to people playing for the first time. It's really good fun. The only downside is queue times. It can take minutes to find a match.

This is super addictive and easy to get into.  The easiest comparison is Rocket League, but this is much better.   There is an crazy amount of subtle skill- adjusting the speed, angles, etc.  I've played around 10 hours and I'm still learning tons.

Downsides?  Sometimes there is a wait for the battle matching and some uneven matches- either I play someone who is great and kills me, or I am trying to not to curb stop someone in their first game.

reviews.review_title: Good in theory, but not very fun.
reviews.review_description: This is an pretty cool concept and an interesting take on the rocket league style gameplay/genre, but in the end, it's unfun and feels very clunky. I understand why some people enjoy this game and have nothing against them, but this game just feels very repetitive and usually ends in a golden goal scenario (this game's version of a sudden death) because usually nobody is actually to advance because of the risk involved and can only score if the goal is too big to easily defend.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts on Ultimechs. We appreciate your feedback and are sorry to hear that you didn't find it enjoyable. We're always looking for ways to improve our game and make it more fun for all players, so we will definitely take your comments into consideration. We hope you'll give us another chance in the future.

reviews.review_description:
Relatively new to VR,  but this is one title I head to whenever I switch my headset on. After some practice with bots, I'm ready and looking forward to getting into competitive matches. Hats off to the developers, I'd happily pay for this.

Still my go to game. I feel it's in the same bracket, so making comparison with rocket league. I'd like to see some deterant to leaving games. Frustrating to have waited for a game and it be left with 2v1 or end.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We’re so happy to hear from you! Thank you for your valuable feedback. If you ever need assistance with the game, please don't hesitate to contact our support team. We hope you'll continue enjoying Ultimechs!

reviews.review_description:
Okay, so I really fell in love with this game! It has awesome graphics, good mechanics, and is really enjoyable! However, I do have a couple problems with it.

1. I think it would be awesome if there were more maps and possibly some missions to earn more coins. Just for the people who really don’t have money to put into the game, just to make it so much more enjoyable. 

2. This is the big one. I went to get on this game and it told me to update it to play online. I went to go update the game but there is no available update for it. So no more online play until this gets fixed.🫠

It’s really an amazing game and I would be happy to give it 5 stars when/if the main issue gets fixed.

developer_response.body:
Hi there and thank you for your review! We're actively working on updates for the game with new content and it's super helpful to get this type of feedback.

Regarding the update, the game went into server maintenance which prevented some from updating the game. We've looked into this to shorten the time and hope to remove it completely in the future or communicate it better.

We hope you stick around for when we can earn that 5-star!

Please either make a mode with no powers or remove them out right. Untill then 1 ⭐ review... Sorry I really do love this game, pleases make better and I will do the same to review

developer_response.body: Hey there and thank you for the feedback. Ultimechs has been designed with the supercharges in mind for each class, but we'll look at potential balancing in future updates, as well as future mech classes! Feel free to join our Discord to discuss different ways to handle scenarios! https://discord.com/invite/srX92DRt9G

reviews.review_description: Don’t want no season pass. Rather make a better game and have people pay for it.

developer_response.body: Hi there, we're sad to hear that. The battle pass in Ultimechs has a free tier, and it won't go away - so you can decide at any point when you'd like to progress or upgrade it. The items are only cosmetics and do not affect the gameplay, we hope that we can use this to continue to develop the game for more people to enjoy it for free.

reviews.review_description: Pay to win

developer_response.body: Hey there! Ultimechs' in-app purchases have no effect on the game and wins and losses are dependent on skill.

reviews.review_description: Good

reviews.review_title: Free, Fun, High Replayability, And More
reviews.review_description: Great game - probably my favorite game out right now. Its super fun, can be competitve or casual, and I've had so many great games in just a day of playing. I highly recommend this game, it's so good! Add me if u want - same name in game.

I don't know how to explain how fun this game is. Im not very good at it still since i got my quest just a few days ago, but for a free game, Im pretty impressed with how fun the game is ! I would definitely recommend to all my quest friends no matter the age!
Great game

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're glad to hear you're enjoying the game. If you ever need assistance with the game, please don't hesitate to contact our support team. We hope you'll continue having a pleasant experience with Ultimechs.

reviews.review_description: Initially looks really fun, but the mechanic is a bit strange to get used to.

developer_response.body: Hi and thanks for the review. Our main aim with the movement system was to create something fast, but also prevent our players from getting motion sick. In our latest update, we adjusted the dashing a bit, so we hope that you have a chance to try it again and let us know what you think!

reviews.review_description: It’s really a nice game and the graphics are great

If you're into robots and soccer, this game is for you, the graphics is amazing.
Things I would like to see in the next updates:
- more stadiums
- ability to add people during the match
- ability to move around in the waiting area
- more robots
- longer games, 3 minutes is not enough
